parameters.query:
=INSERT INTO spam_submissions (
  email,
  first_name,
  last_name,
  phone,
  company,
  message,
  spam_score,
  classification,
  action_taken,
  spam_reasons,
  submission_count,
  user_agent,
  created_at
) VALUES (
  '{{ $json.email }}',
  '{{ $json.first_name }}',
  '{{ $json.last_name }}',
  '{{ $json.phone }}',
  '{{ $json.company }}',
  '{{ $json.message }}',
  {{ $json.spam_score }},
  '{{ $json.classification }}',
  '{{ $json.action }}',
  '{{ JSON.stringify($json.spam_reasons) }}',
  {{ $json.submission_count }},
  '{{ $json.user_agent }}',
  NOW()
);

parameters.responseBody:
={
  "success": true,
  "action": "{{ $('Code: Rate Limit Check').item.json.action }}",
  "spam_score": {{ $('Code: Rate Limit Check').item.json.spam_score }},
  "classification": "{{ $('Code: Rate Limit Check').item.json.classification }}",
  "message": "Form submission validated successfully"
}
